news.headline: The Women Running Businesses Under Taliban Rules
news.summary: With secondary education and most jobs out of reach, thousands of Afghan women have turned to entrepreneurship as the only path to make money and maintain a social life.

news.headline: Indian cricketer, 15, hits record-breaking 50 in just 11 balls
news.summary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi breaks the record for the fastest 50-over List A half-century in history on the same day he was not included in India's one-day international squad.
